---
title: "Publications"
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  contents: 
    - title: "Pressure-induced changes in microbial community structure in the Mediterranean Sea"
      author: "Garel, M. et al."
      year: 2024
      journal: "Deep Sea Research Part I"
      doi: "10.1016/j.dsr.2024.104245"
      type: "Article"
    - title: "Novel PHP sensor for deep-sea exploration"
      author: "Smith, J. & Garel, M."
      year: 2023
      journal: "Ocean Engineering"
      doi: "10.1016/j.oceaneng.2023.111222"
      type: "Article"
  type: table
  sort: "year desc"
  fields: [year, title, author, journal, type]
  field-display-names:
    year: "Année"
    title: "Titre"
    author: "Auteurs"
    journal: "Revue"
    type: "Type"
---

Retrouvez ci-dessous la liste de mes publications scientifiques. Vous pouvez également télécharger mon fichier [BibTeX](references.bib).

::: {#sample-listings}
:::
